title: Notification No.63/2010-Cus(NT),dt. 7.7.2010
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No. 63/2010-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, dated the 7th July, 2010. Ashada, 1932 Saka. S.O. (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs, Bangalore to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on the officers specified in column (3) of the Table below in respect of the Show Cause Notices pertaining to M/s. Hewlett-Packard India Sales Pvt. Ltd. situated at No. 24, 'Salarpuria Arena', Hosur Road, Adugodi, Bangalore- 560030 and others issued by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Bangalore Zonal Unit, Bangalore and specified in the corresponding column (2) the said Table, for the purposes of adjudication. TABLE Sr. No Number of Show Cause Notice & date Designation of officer (1) (2) (3) 1. S/IV/24/2008-AHM dated 29.04.2010 Commissioner of Customs, Ahmedabad 2. S/IV/24/2008-AMR dated 29.04.2010 Commissioner of Customs (Prev), Amritsar 3. S/IV/24/2008-BHUdated 29.04.2010 Commissioner of Central Excise, Customs and S.Tax, Bhubaneshwar-I 4.
